package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGrpcMetadataParsedRepeatedly() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_framework_performance_grpc_metadata_parsed_repeatedly"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag repeated metadata extraction/parsing in gRPC interceptors and handlers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
